text: DynamoDB Concepts @ st @ s * NoSQL Public Database-as-a-Service (DBaaSs) - Key/Value & Document ¢ No self-managed servers or infrastructure e Manual / Automatic provisioned performance IN/OUT or On-Demand ¢ Highly Resilient ... across AZs and optionally global ¢ Really fast .. single-digit milliseconds (SSD based) * Backups, point-in-time recovery, encryption at rest ¢ Event-Driven integration ... do things when data changes
